metadata.name: shadowspace
metadata.description: ShadowSpace - Private Social on Solana via MagicBlock PERs

instructions.name: append_message
docs: Append a message — runs inside ER, FREE

accounts.name: commenter_profile
docs: The commenter's profile — used to resolve real wallet for session keys

instructions.name: create_conversation
docs: Create an ephemeral conversation inside MagicBlock ER.
Profile PDA sponsors the account rent inside the rollup.
`message_capacity` — pre-allocate space for this many messages (avoids realloc).

accounts.name: profile
docs: The user's profile — used to resolve real wallet for session keys

instructions.name: migrate_profile
docs: Resize an existing profile account to the current schema size.
This is needed when the Profile struct grows (e.g. adding follower/following counts).

accounts.name: reactor_profile
docs: The reactor's profile — used to resolve real wallet for session keys + reaction PDA

instructions.name: top_up_profile
docs: Top up profile with lamports (to sponsor ephemeral conversations)
